---
title: "test_taliesin.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_taliesin.py"
loc: 258
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.15
style_score: 3.54
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.00
---

## Intent
The `test_taliesin.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestXAPI, test_load_credentials_returns_true_when_all_present, test_load_credentials_returns_false_when_missing, test_post_article_simulated_when_unconfigured, test_post_article_simulation_mode_when_configured, taliesin_root, create_spoke, TestGatherContext, test_gather_context_includes_journal_and_memory, test_gather_context_empty_when_no_files, TestGeneratePost, test_generate_post_article_mode_success, test_generate_post_story_narrator, test_generate_post_story_character, test_generate_post_missing_contract_returns_none, test_generate_post_uplink_failure_returns_none, TestIngestStyle, test_ingest_updates_voice_contracts, test_ingest_strips_markdown_fences, test_ingest_backs_up_existing_contracts, test_ingest_empty_corpus_returns_false, test_ingest_uplink_failure_returns_false, TestStagingGateTerminal, test_staging_gate_approve, test_staging_gate_reject, test_staging_gate_edit_saves_reinforcement, TestStagingGateAgent, test_agent_mode_writes_staging_queue, test_agent_mode_does_not_call_input. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestXAPI, test_load_credentials_returns_true_when_all_present, test_load_credentials_returns_false_when_missing, test_post_article_simulated_when_unconfigured, test_post_article_simulation_mode_when_configured, taliesin_root, create_spoke, TestGatherContext, test_gather_context_includes_journal_and_memory, test_gather_context_empty_when_no_files, TestGeneratePost, test_generate_post_article_mode_success, test_generate_post_story_narrator, test_generate_post_story_character, test_generate_post_missing_contract_returns_none, test_generate_post_uplink_failure_returns_none, TestIngestStyle, test_ingest_updates_voice_contracts, test_ingest_strips_markdown_fences, test_ingest_backs_up_existing_contracts, test_ingest_empty_corpus_returns_false, test_ingest_uplink_failure_returns_false, TestStagingGateTerminal, test_staging_gate_approve, test_staging_gate_reject, test_staging_gate_edit_saves_reinforcement, TestStagingGateAgent, test_agent_mode_writes_staging_queue, test_agent_mode_does_not_call_input. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 46 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.x_api](file://src.sentinel.x_api)
- [src.sentinel.x_api](file://src.sentinel.x_api)
- [src.sentinel.x_api](file://src.sentinel.x_api)
- [src.sentinel.x_api](file://src.sentinel.x_api)
- [src.sentinel.taliesin](file://src.sentinel.taliesin)

### Exports
- `TestXAPI`
- `test_load_credentials_returns_true_when_all_present`
- `test_load_credentials_returns_false_when_missing`
- `test_post_article_simulated_when_unconfigured`
- `test_post_article_simulation_mode_when_configured`
- `taliesin_root`
- `create_spoke`
- `TestGatherContext`
- `test_gather_context_includes_journal_and_memory`
- `test_gather_context_empty_when_no_files`
- `TestGeneratePost`
- `test_generate_post_article_mode_success`
- `test_generate_post_story_narrator`
- `test_generate_post_story_character`
- `test_generate_post_missing_contract_returns_none`
- `test_generate_post_uplink_failure_returns_none`
- `TestIngestStyle`
- `test_ingest_updates_voice_contracts`
- `test_ingest_strips_markdown_fences`
- `test_ingest_backs_up_existing_contracts`
- `test_ingest_empty_corpus_returns_false`
- `test_ingest_uplink_failure_returns_false`
- `TestStagingGateTerminal`
- `test_staging_gate_approve`
- `test_staging_gate_reject`
- `test_staging_gate_edit_saves_reinforcement`
- `TestStagingGateAgent`
- `test_agent_mode_writes_staging_queue`
- `test_agent_mode_does_not_call_input`
